emails.subject: IT news from FERC
emails.body: Electronic Filings/Demo of FERC home page and search functions might be a good topic for one of our staff meetings. Nancy Bagot could present in person or via Video Conference. Also, I gathered the Koch and Dominion materials regarding standards of conduct in electric proceedings. I'd be happy to present but I also thought Tony would be a good choice as it would help him get up to speed on the Marketing Affiliate Rule. Let's discuss. thanks, Maria Forwarded by Maria Pavlou/ET&S/Enron on 11/01/2000 10:38 AM Nancy Bagot 10/31/2000 02:02 PM

Let's discuss. thanks, Maria Forwarded by Maria Pavlou/ET&S/Enron on 11/01/2000 10:38 AM Nancy Bagot 10/31/2000 02:02 PM

emails.body: Re: IT news from FERC Grab me to discuss for a few minutes--both would be interesting topics. DF Maria Pavlou 11/01/2000 10:51 AM
